sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53353" key="karka/dwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρκάδων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, gender unknown, <sense id="n53353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the fee paid to Charon by the dead</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>:—expld. by some Gramm. as name of a plant.</sense> </entryFree>
